mapper.select: select * from gb_department_dis_goods as gddg left join gb_distributer_alias as gda on gda.gb_DA_dis_goods_id = gddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id left join gb_distributer_standard as gds on gds.gb_DS_dis_goods_id = gddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id left join gb_department as gd on gd.gb_department_id = gddg.gb_DDG_gb_department_id left join nx_distributer as nd on nd.nx_distributer_id = gddg.gb_DDG_nx_distributer_goods_id left join nx_distributer_goods as ndg on ndg.nx_distributer_goods_id = gddg.gb_DDG_nx_distributer_goods_id where gb_department_dis_goods_id = #{value}

SELECT ddg.*, dg.*, s.*, dfg.*, great.*, greatGrand.*, greatGrand.gb_distributer_father_goods_id AS greatFatherId, ng.*, dor.*, gdgs.* FROM (
SELECT ddg.gb_department_dis_goods_id FROM gb_department_dis_goods AS ddg
LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_goods AS dg ON dg.gb_distributer_goods_id = ddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_father_goods AS dfg ON dfg.gb_distributer_father_goods_id = ddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_father_id LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_father_goods AS great ON great.gb_distributer_father_goods_id = dfg.gb_dfg_fathers_father_id LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_father_goods AS greatGrand ON greatGrand.gb_distributer_father_goods_id = great.gb_dfg_fathers_father_id
AND ddg.gb_DDG_department_id = #{depId}
AND ddg.gb_DDG_gb_dis_id = #{disId}
AND dg.gb_dg_pull_off = #{pull}
AND dg.gb_dg_dfg_goods_father_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY greatGrand.gb_dfg_father_goods_sort, great.gb_dfg_father_goods_sort, dfg.gb_dfg_father_goods_sort, dg.gb_dg_goods_sort
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) AS base
INNER JOIN gb_department_dis_goods AS ddg ON ddg.gb_department_dis_goods_id = base.gb_department_dis_goods_id
LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_goods AS dg ON dg.gb_distributer_goods_id = ddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_standard AS s ON s.gb_DS_dis_goods_id = dg.gb_distributer_goods_id LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_father_goods AS dfg ON dfg.gb_distributer_father_goods_id = ddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_father_id LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_father_goods AS great ON great.gb_distributer_father_goods_id = dfg.gb_dfg_fathers_father_id
LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_father_goods AS greatGrand ON greatGrand.gb_distributer_father_goods_id = great.gb_dfg_fathers_father_id
LEFT JOIN nx_goods AS ng ON ng.nx_goods_id = great.gb_dfg_nx_goods_id
LEFT JOIN gb_department_orders AS dor ON dor.gb_DO_dis_goods_id = ddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id AND dor.gb_DO_status < #{status} AND dor.gb_DO_status > -1 AND dor.gb_DO_department_id = #{depId} AND dor.gb_DO_order_type != 9
LEFT JOIN gb_department_goods_stock AS gdgs ON gdgs.gb_dgs_gb_dis_goods_id = ddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id AND gdgs.gb_dgs_rest_weight > 0 AND gdgs.gb_dgs_status > -1 AND gdgs.gb_dgs_gb_department_id = #{depId}
LEFT JOIN gb_distributer_standard as nds on nds.gb_DS_dis_goods_id = ddg.gb_DDG_dis_goods_id
ORDER BY
greatGrand.gb_dfg_father_goods_sort, great.gb_dfg_father_goods_sort, dfg.gb_dfg_father_goods_sort, dg.gb_dg_goods_sort, gdgs.gb_dgs_date
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_department_dis_goods where gb_department_dis_goods_id in
#{gbDepartmentDisGoodsId}
